channel.title: Maine Legislature Public Hearings & Work Sessions (structured schedule)
channel.description: Structured hearing/work-session data POSTed from the Legislature's own schedule endpoint (legislature.maine.gov/bills/getPHWSForDate.asp, the same call the phwkSched.html page makes client-side), covering a window from 7 days back to 38 days ahead. Each item is one scheduled Public Hearing or Work Session with bill, committee, time, and room; the ICS calendar for this source carries real event times and locations. Zero items outside legislative sessions is normal, not a failure.
